description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by a dense border of mature trees, providing privacy and a natural setting. The structure features a low-pitched, expansive roof with a modern, flat profile and a mix of gray and neutral tones. The front area includes a driveway leading to a carport or garage, with a pink car parked outside, and a small landscaped garden with shrubs and a tree. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious patio area, possibly with a pool or deck, and additional outdoor seating. Large windows and sliding glass doors are visible, allowing for ample natural light and a connection to the outdoors. The overall design is modern and open, with clean lines and a focus on blending indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by trees, featuring a driveway, carport, and spacious patio with large windows.
description_view_0: The front view shows the driveway, carport, pink car, landscaped garden, and the main entrance with large windows.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the driveway, carport, and the dense tree border, with less visibility of the patio area.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the patio or deck area, outdoor seating, and the full extent of the tree enclosure.
description_view_3: This angled view shows the driveway, carport, and the transition from the front garden to the tree-lined perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
